chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-165 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 524/25 3.For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w Inspector Gul Hassan, SHO, P.S, Raza Goth, Inspector Rano Khan, SHO, P.S, Sadhuja, SIP Imdad Ali, SHO, P.S, Khadehri and SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and DIGP, Sukkur. **** Mr. Abdul Waheed Mahar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of No.13, taken on record. In compliance of order, learned counsel for petitioner places on record certain documents, taken on record. Learned DPG files statements on behalf of respondents No.3 & 5 and report of a Team, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner. In their statements, they have categorically stated to have taken all out hectic efforts for the arrest of absconding accused but they need some more time. Learned Law Officers submit that since Challans in both FIRs No. 10 of 2022 of P.S, Raza Goth and FIR No.06 of 2015 of P.S, Khadari have been submitted before the trial Court; hence, directions may be issued to trial Courts to adopt hectic measures to procure the attendance of absconding accused. After such statements, counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to trial Courts to adopt coercive measures for arrest of absconding accused.

After such statements, counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to trial Courts to adopt coercive measures for arrest of absconding accused. Let copy of this order be communicated to the trial Courts for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
